description: Create and deploy a channel named 'JSON_to_HL7_Gateway' that accepts patient registration JSON data via an HTTP Listener on port 6661 and converts it to HL7v2.5.1 ADT^A04 format. The transformation must map patient.mrn to PID-3, patient.lastName^patient.firstName to PID-5, patient.dateOfBirth (YYYY-MM-DD) to PID-7 (YYYYMMDD), patient.sex to PID-8, and visit.visitNumber to PV1-19, using ADT, A04, ADT_A01 in MSH-9. The processed messages must be written to /tmp/hl7_output/ using unique filenames. A sample JSON payload for testing is provided at /home/ga/sample_registration.json.
